title: Consent Form
study_name: VideoPoints User Study on Video Detailed Summary

pdf.intro: Please review this Consent Form, which provides the relevant information about this survey. Then check the box below to confirm your agreement to participate.
pdf.agreement_label: I have reviewed the consent form and agree to participate.

sections.heading: Purpose of the Study
sections.text: You are invited to take part in a research study about AI enhanced lecture video usage in STEM coursework. The research evaluates the real-world effectiveness of AI enhancements in lecture videos and how students make use of these features.

sections.heading: Procedures
sections.text: If you agree to participate, you will be asked to complete an online survey about your usage and impressions of features in Videopoints. You may refuse to answer any question and may terminate the survey without giving a reason. The survey typically takes up to 10 minutes.

sections.heading: Risks and Discomforts
sections.text: The study team does not expect any risks related to the research activities. If you choose to take part and experience a negative event that you feel is related to the study, please contact the researcher or study team.

sections.heading: Benefits
sections.text: There is no direct benefit or compensation for participating. Possible benefits to others include an improved video driven learning experience for future students.

sections.heading: Confidentiality and Data Privacy
sections.text: Taking part in this project is anonymous, and the information you provide cannot be linked to your identity. Because responses are anonymous, submitted survey data cannot be removed after submission.

sections.heading: Participation Choice
sections.text: Taking part is up to you. You can choose not to take part, agree to take part and later change your mind, and ask questions before deciding or at any time during the study. Your decision will not be held against you and will have no effect on your grades or standing with the University of Houston.

sections.heading: Contact Information
sections.text: For questions, concerns, or complaints, contact the research team at jaspal@uh.edu or 713 743 3340. For questions about your rights as a research participant, contact the University of Houston Institutional Review Board at (713) 743-9204 or cphs@central.uh.edu.

agreement_label: I have reviewed the consent form and agree to participate.
